lints.name: rls_disabled_in_public
lints.title: RLS Disabled in Public
lints.description: Detects cases where row level security (RLS) has not been enabled on tables in schemas exposed to PostgREST
lints.detail: Table \`public.prompt_shares\` is public, but RLS has not been enabled.

lints.name: rls_policy_always_true
lints.title: RLS Policy Always True
lints.description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
lints.detail: Table `public.plaza_prompts` has an RLS policy `Users can update likes_count of prompts` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for -.

metadata.name: plaza_prompts
metadata.policy_name: Users can update likes_count of prompts

lints.name: rls_policy_always_true
lints.title: RLS Policy Always True
lints.description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
lints.detail: Table `public.prompt_template` has an RLS policy `Allow public view count update` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for anon, authenticated.

lints.name: rls_policy_always_true
lints.title: RLS Policy Always True
lints.description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
lints.detail: Table `public.tags` has an RLS policy `Everyone can create tags` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for authenticated.

lints.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
lints.title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
lints.description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
lints.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.

lints.name: vulnerable_postgres_version
lints.title: Current Postgres version has security patches available
lints.description: Upgrade your postgres database to apply important security patches
lints.detail: We have detected that the current version of postgres, supabase-postgres-15.8.1.023, has outstanding security patches available. Upgrade your database to receive the latest security patches.
